case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. RONALD HODGE

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HODGE, RONALD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-28-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
